steps.title: Define the tent counts
steps.content: Let $x$ be the number of two-person tents. Since there are $56$ tents total, the number of four-person tents is $56-x$.

steps.title: Use the people total
steps.content:
All tents are full, so the total capacity is $188$ people.
$$2x+4(56-x)=188$$
$$2x+224-4x=188$$
$$224-2x=188$$
$$2x=36$$
$$x=18$$
The answer is C.
